# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Fable Frog, please report it responsibly using **GitHub's private vulnerability reporting**:

1. Go to the [Security tab](https://github.com/Fable-Frog/fablefrog-feedback/security) of this repository.
2. Click **"Report a vulnerability"**.
3. Fill in the details and submit.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work with you to understand and address the issue.

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

## Scope

This repository is a feedback tracker — it does not contain application source code. Security reports here should relate to:

- Vulnerabilities in the Fable Frog iOS app
- Privacy concerns with data handling
- Authentication or server communication issues

For vulnerabilities in the Audiobookshelf server itself, please report them to the [Audiobookshelf project](https://github.com/audiobookshelf/audiobookshelf/security).
